#### Explore software engineer jobs and build the future of payments and beyond

As a **Software Engineer** at Mastercard, you will design, build, and optimize **high-performing, highly scalable software solutions** and products for some of the world's top brands. Using advanced cloud platforms, AI frameworks, and secure blockchain technologies, your work will transcend borders, connecting communities and transforming commerce. You will play a vital role in how billions of people interact with payments and beyond.

Here, **creativity** thrives, **curiosity** is celebrated, and **bold ideas** are embraced. We empower our employees to make decisions, take ownership of their careers, and drive meaningful change. Through structured **career development** programs, **mentorship** from industry leaders, and access to **cutting-edge tools**, we ensure your ambitions are supported and your talents are cultivated.

Whether you're passionate about**cybersecurity, cryptocurrency, artificial intelligence**, or other cutting-edge technologies, you will play a key role in redefining how the world interacts with payments. At Mastercard, the future is ours to define. Let's build it together.

# Innovate technologies that transform the world

Solve the enthralling, high-scale challenges that engineers live for. We reward curiosity, unlock potential, and empower you to make a global impact on the future of AI, cloud, and database technologies.

[Search all jobs](https://careers.oracle.com/en/sites/jobsearch/jobs?keyword=Engineering%20and%20Development&location=United%20States&locationId=300000000149325)

- **[Cloud Development Engineer](https://careers.oracle.com/en/sites/jobsearch/jobs?keyword=Cloud%20Development%20Engineer&location=United%20States&locationId=300000000149325)**
Build and operate a suite of massive-scale, integrated cloud services that deliver best-in-class compute, storage, networking, database, and security. Your innovations will influence the future of cloud computing.



[Apply now](https://careers.oracle.com/en/sites/jobsearch/jobs?keyword=Cloud%20Development%20Engineer&location=United%20States&locationId=300000000149325)

- **[User Experience Developer](https://careers.oracle.com/en/sites/jobsearch/jobs?keyword=User%20Experience%20Developer&location=United%20States&locationId=300000000149325)**
Turn the user experience into a human journey. You’ll deliver simple, elegant, and intuitive UX solutions—and craft experiences that highlight our products’ unique capabilities.



[Apply now](https://careers.oracle.com/en/sites/jobsearch/jobs?keyword=User%20Experience%20Developer&location=United%20States&locationId=300000000149325)

- **[Software Engineer](https://careers.oracle.com/en/sites/jobsearch/jobs?keyword=Software%20Engineer&location=United%20States&locationId=300000000149325)**
Build the cutting-edge software that makes Oracle an industry leader. You’ll deep dive into every layer of the stack, advancing our products, infrastructure, and platforms. Use your expertise to change how the world does business.



[Apply now](https://careers.oracle.com/en/sites/jobsearch/jobs?keyword=Software%20Engineer&location=United%20States&locationId=300000000149325)


- **[Product Manager](https://careers.oracle.com/en/sites/jobsearch/jobs?keyword=Product%20Manager&location=United%20States&locationId=300000000149325)**
Bridge engineering and business by leading the market-facing aspects of product development. You will help Oracle products evolve based on market analysis, customer feedback, sales channels, and technology innovations.



[Apply now](https://careers.oracle.com/en/sites/jobsearch/jobs?keyword=Product%20Manager&location=United%20States&locationId=300000000149325)

- **[Data Scientist](https://careers.oracle.com/en/sites/jobsearch/jobs?keyword=Data%20Scientist&location=United%20States&locationId=300000000149325)**
Turn complex data into actionable recommendations that can improve our business. You will track our business goals, find the root of operational issues, and find new ways to enhance our products.

Deliver breakthrough experiences with speed and scale

Our tech stack empowers engineers to build AI-powered solutions to people’s most challenging financial problems and serve around 100 million customers with TurboTax, Credit Karma, QuickBooks, and Mailchimp.

![Image Alt Text](https://digitalasset.intuit.com/render/content/dam/intuit/ic/en_us/images/soft-eng-in-sub1-Genos-Graphic.jpg)

GenAI/GenOS

Intuit’s proprietary Generative AI Operating System (GenOS) is a revolutionary approach to AI development that allows our thousands of developers to rapidly scale new AI capabilities across our product portfolio–with privacy, security, and data governance built in.

[Learn more](https://www.intuit.com/blog/innovative-thinking/accelerating-development-velocity-with-major-enhancements-to-genos/)

![Image Alt Text](https://digitalasset.intuit.com/render/content/dam/intuit/ic/en_us/images/soft-eng-in-sub2-modern-SaaS-AIR.jpg)

Dev tools & infrastructure

At Intuit, we empower developers with advanced AI tools and open-source technologies. Our AI-native development platform, Modern SaaS AIR, leverages cloud-native technologies like Kubernetes, Argo, Istio, Envoy, and AWS to accelerate development velocity. This platform provides AI-driven capabilities such as code generation, intelligent scaling, and seamless debugging to deliver fast, higher-quality applications. Our platform is driving the future of software innovation and powering industry-leading solutions like QuickBooks, TurboTax, Credit Karma and Mailchimp.

[Learn more](https://tfir.io/from-cloud-to-ai-native-how-intuit-is-paving-the-future-of-development/ "Learn more")

![Image Alt Text](https://digitalasset.intuit.com/render/content/dam/intuit/ic/en_us/images/soft-eng-in-sub3-logos.jpg)

Languages & libraries

We embrace polyglot development, empowering our engineers to choose the best programming languages and frameworks suited to their use cases. Our diverse tech stack includes React, Go, Python, Java, R, Swift, Kotlin, and Angular, enabling innovation across every layer of our platform. To enhance productivity, we provide AI-powered code generation tools tailored to Intuit’s unique context. These tools deliver meaningful suggestions, automate unit test creation, and offer AI-generated summaries to debug issues quickly and effectively.

## Remote Software Engineer Jobs in India     Earn up to  $200,000  USD/YEAR

[Apply Now](https://www.crossover.com/jobs/5346/software-engineering/apply)

## Role Description

Eager to build the future of technology? At Crossover, we connect the best developers in the world with elite full-time remote software developer jobs at American tech companies.

Our clients searching for the top 1% of creative coders, problem-solving programmers, and AI visionaries who want to tackle the toughest challenges in tech and create groundbreaking solutions.

Our remote software engineering jobs put you at the forefront of innovation, working with a trailblazing tech stack incl. GenAI, Machine Learning, and cloud computing to solve high-stakes business challenges.

You’ll work with world-class companies like [Trilogy](https://www.crossover.com/), [CloudFix](https://www.crossover.com/), [IgniteTech](https://www.crossover.com/) and [Totogi](https://www.crossover.com/) collaborating with top engineering teams to design technically superior solutions, break through barriers, and redefine what’s possible in software development.

Whether you’re scaling global applications, using generative AI to revolutionize business processes, or crafting flawless code that changes industries, this is your chance to elevate your profile as one of the world’s best (and best paid) coders.

If you’re ready to innovate, lead, and join an elite class of remote software engineers, explore our software developer positions today - and let’s build the future of technology together.

Read More

## Applying for Crossover Software Engineering Roles

Applying for remote engineering jobs on Crossover [is challenging](https://www.crossover.com/selection-process) – but that’s why you’ll love it. We’re not looking for your everyday software engineer.

We want the best of the best—coders who excel at solving complex problems and delivering technically flawless solutions.

If you’re ready to take on remote software engineering jobs that challenge you to think bigger, build smarter, and code cleaner, you’ve found your people.

We value developers who bring more than just technical skills to the table. The ideal candidates are systems thinkers, full-stack innovators, and cloud architects who are obsessed with solving real-world problems.

You don’t just write code. You engineer solutions that matter.

**You build the world online.**

At Crossover, you’ll be working on the cutting edge of AI, Machine Learning, and cloud computing to build technology that redefines global industries. If you’re ready to push the limits of your talent, this is where you belong.

The application process is designed to be rigorous, fast, and fair - because your skills should do the talking.

You’ll start with a [series of skill tests](https://www.crossover.com/blog/ccat-guide) and real work assessments tailored to gauge your coding expertise, problem-solving ability, and capacity to think critically under pressure.

These are built to separate the great from the good.

From there – if you impress us - you’ll interview directly with a senior leader who will evaluate your fit for the role. Within days, you could join an elite global network of software developers working on projects that truly matter.

At Crossover, remote developer jobs mean more than a massive paycheck. They mean autonomy, mastery, and the chance to work with the sharpest minds in the world.

If that sounds like your kind of challenge, we want to meet you.

## Responsibilities as a Remote Developer

Software engineering at Crossover isn’t your typical job - it’s an opportunity to lead with new technology, building incredible software products with precision and innovation.

These developer roles go far beyond standard, run-of-the-mill coding jobs.

Whether you’re fully remote, leading high-impact projects from home, or collaborating with global teams while travelling, you’ll be at the forefront of transforming how businesses leverage technology.

Your responsibilities won’t look like your average software engineering role.

Each remote software developer job is designed for maximum impact and innovation – and is metrics-orientated.

You’ll collaborate with other elite computer engineers to write code (in any language) that solves impactful business problems.

This is a unique opportunity to engineer change while working in a dynamic, fully remote environment that supports what software development can be.

- **Solve Deep Complex Problems:** Create technically superior solutions to high-level business challenges using innovative approaches and advanced tools.
- **Engineer, Prototype, Deliver:** Design, prototype, and deploy solutions that directly impact business operations and customer success.
- **Collaborate Globally:** Work with top-tier software engineers from around the world, sharing expertise and delivering flawless results.
- **Leverage AI and Cloud Technology:** Use cutting-edge technologies and personal productivity tools to accelerate development, improve efficiency, and drive results.
- **Continuous Improvement:** Stay ahead of industry trends and continually refine your skills to remain at the top of your field.

On Crossover, you’ll become part of a global movement that’s revolutionizing how software engineers shape the digital age of interconnected virtual reality.

## Minimum Requirements for Remote Software Engineering Jobs

At Crossover, we don’t believe a traditional resume tells the whole story - it’s your skills, innovation, and drive that set you apart. If you can ace our rigorous skill tests, you already have what it takes to excel in our remote software engineering jobs.

We’re looking for top 1% developers who think fast, have a bias for action and are ready to push the boundaries of what’s possible in software development.

Success here is about results, not just credentials.

**Here’s what makes you stand out:**

- **Proven Expertise:** A track record of delivering successful software projects, whether you’re self-taught or hold a degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field.
- **Mastery of Code:** Strong coding abilities in one or more programming languages, paired with a passion for writing clean, efficient, and scalable code.
- **AI-First Mindset:** The ability to use AI and Machine Learning automation to accelerate your workflows and solve real-world challenges.
- **Problem-Solving Superpower:** The ability to tackle complex issues, think critically, and deliver technically superior solutions.
- **Autonomy and Drive:** A quick learner who thrives independently, loves deep work and consistently delivers at the highest level.
- **Commitment to Excellence:** An eagerness to stay ahead of industry trends, improve your skills, and embrace cutting-edge technologies. You want to be a coder of note who goes down in history as an influencer in your time.

We’re looking for experienced software developers who are motivated to dive into fast-paced, results-driven environments.

If this sounds like your dream programming role, join us and apply!

$100,000  USD/year ($50 USD/hour)

## Key responsibilities

- Using AI to build software that solves real user problems, ships fast, and stays maintainable long-term

## Description

Are you a Full-Stack Engineer who thrives on solving complex challenges and delivering high-impact features? Join our team to build innovative AI-powered products that transform how people learn and grow. You’ll focus on high-quality execution, ensuring our products are scalable, maintainable, and impactful.

You’ll work on products that are transforming learning:

- **TeachTap:** Leverages AI to bring historical figures to life in a TikTok-like learning experience.
- **TeachTales:** Engages students with personalized, magical storytelling that boosts comprehension.
- **TimeBack:** Acts as a learning copilot that integrates with existing apps, proactively coaching students.
- **Athena**: Uses AI-generated videos and tests to deliver measurable academic outcomes.

This role exists to deliver real-world impact through working software. You’ll use AI tools and cloud-native technologies to build full-stack systems that solve meaningful problems, not just tick off tickets. You’ll be expected to ship fast without cutting corners, choosing the simplest correct solution that balances short-term speed with long-term maintainability.

If you’re ready to solve complex technical challenges and deliver impactful features, we’d love to hear from you.

## Candidate requirements

- At least 4 years of experience writing production code for web applications' frontend and backend (any framework).
- Strong ownership: Demonstrated experience owning complete modules, product features, or teams, not just contributing siloed tasks
- Independent execution: The ability to unblock yourself, set your own pace, and find paths forward in ambiguous situations
- Experience in using generative A.I. in your day-to-day development work

1525 OPEN JOBS

# Software Development

Technology is in everything we do. We rely on it to provide the excellence our customers deserve. And that’s why our software engineers are crucial to every aspect of our operations.

## Building impactful solutions at large scale

Do you want to use your knowledge to build software solutions? Do you enjoy solving complex problems? In a fast-paced and innovative environment, there are so many projects you can work on. And you can take pride in knowing you’ll improve the lives of millions of people around the world.

With us, you’ll enhance your skills and work with other talented minds. You’ll have freedom to explore and turn your ideas into reality. The learning possibilities are endless. You’ll build a strong career knowing you have all the tools to thrive.

## Voices of Amazonians

Paige

Software Development Engineer II

### “What keeps me energized at work is the vast number of complex challenges that my team and I solve on a daily basis.”

Fatema

Software Development Engineer

### “Being a software engineer at Amazon empowers me to work on different problems and help people in their daily lives.”

Ihar

Software Development Engineer II
